untranslatable_reason: This signal requires market beta calculations and cross-asset ranking/quintile classification, which are portfolio-level factor constructs not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires monthly rebalancing logic across a basket of assets. Beta ranking, quintile classification, and systematic rebalancing signals are not among the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, etc.). This requires external factor data and portfolio construction rules beyond single-asset technical analysis.
translation_notes: BAB (Betting Against Beta) is a systematic factor strategy that requires: (1) calculation of market beta for each asset, (2) ranking assets into quintiles, (3) portfolio construction with equal weighting within quintiles, and (4) monthly rebalancing. None of these operations can be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. This is a structural limitation—the strategy operates at the portfolio/factor level, not the price-action level.
